title: RPTools
description: Tools for roleplays, images, videos, media.
body:
# ⭐ RPTools — The Ultimate Roleplay Item Pack!

### Bring your Minecraft stories, videos, and roleplays to life.

RPTools is a massive content pack built for creators, YouTubers, server owners, and anyone who loves making Minecraft feel more alive. This mod adds a huge collection of items, props, tools, decorations, and everyday objects that make building scenes and roleplay worlds easier than ever.

Whether you're filming a Minecraft short, running an RP server, or just messing around with friends, RPTools gives you everything you need to create immersive, detailed environments.

## 🎭 What Is RPTools?

RPTools is a fully free roleplay-focused item expansion mod that introduces dozens of new objects across multiple categories:

✔ Everyday Items

Perfect for building houses, schools, cities, shops, or modern bases.

✔ Electronics

Cameras, phones, computers, monitors, keyboards, microphones, and more — ideal for YouTube setups, office builds, or tech roleplays.

✔ Decorations

Small props, furniture-like objects, aesthetic items, and scene fillers to make environments feel real.

✔ RP Tools & Props

Items specifically made for filming, storytelling, and setting up scenes.

And this is only a fraction of what the mod includes — RPTools is designed to give you as many useful props as possible for any theme or setting.

## 🔥 Why Download RPTools?

If you’re into roleplay, content creation, script videos, machinimas, or realistic builds, this mod is basically a must-have.

It makes your worlds feel alive

It adds tons of items to improve your storytelling

It helps you build RP scenes faster

Perfect for servers, SMPs, and shorts creators

Works great for decorating bases too — not only RP

Whatever scenario you have in mind, RPTools probably has something for it.

## 🔒 Completely Free

RPTools is 100% free forever.
If anyone tries to sell it to you, they’re lying.
All assets, textures, and source files are available on the official GitHub page for full transparency.

## ❓ FAQ — Why should I download this mod?

Simple: RPTools gives you everything you need to roleplay in Minecraft.

Instead of searching for multiple mods to get props, décor, or modern items, RPTools bundles all of it into one clean, lightweight package.
If you make videos or RP with friends, this mod instantly improves your experience.

## 🎬 Make Your Roleplays Better

Scenes look better.
Videos look cleaner.
Worlds feel more alive.

### RPTools is designed to help you create anything you imagine.
